tools.name: query-hotel-checkout-performance
tools.description: Use this single benchmark tool for hotel checkout timing and upsell handling. Set `operation` to `rows` for show, compare, browse, inspect, or review requests. Set `operation` to `rank`, `list`, or `count` for direct computed answers such as fastest or slowest rankings, which companies or models matched a filter, how many rows matched, or which companies had a given upsell behavior.

tools.name: submit-website-benchmark-request
tools.description: Use this tool when a user wants OTseek to benchmark their website. Collect their name, email, company name, website URL, and optional request notes. Notes must be no longer than 500 characters. Supply an idempotency_key and reuse it only when retrying the exact same submission after an interruption.
